ham.subject: Upcoming VPN Maintenance – 15th May 2026 02:00–04:00 UTC
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on Friday, 15 May 2026 from 02:00 UTC to 04:00 UTC. During this window, all VPN connections will be unavailable, which may affect remote access to internal resources.

**What you need to know:**
- All employees must plan their work accordingly.
- If you rely on VPN for critical tasks, consider using the internal network once the maintenance is complete.
- The maintenance is part of our quarterly security upgrade and will improve overall performance.

If you experience any issues after the maintenance window, please contact the IT Help Desk at helpdesk@example.com or call extension 1234.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,

IT Operations Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet Has Been Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

We regret to inform you that due to recent suspicious activity, your crypto wallet (ID: 0xABCD1234EF567890) has been temporarily suspended to protect your assets.

**Immediate Action Required**
To prevent permanent lockout and potential loss of funds, please verify your identity and confirm ownership by following the steps below:

1. Click the link below to access the secure verification portal.
   <URL>
2. Enter your wallet ID and the last four digits of your registered mobile number.
3. Follow the on-screen prompts to upload a recent selfie and a copy of your government-issued ID.

Please complete this process within 24 hours. Failure to do so may result in irreversible account restrictions and potential loss of cryptocurrency holdings.

If you believe this suspension is a mistake, reply to this email with the subject line "Wallet Verification – 0xABCD1234EF567890" and include the requested documentation.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

Security Team
CryptoSafe Inc.
